originalText: וַיָּקָם עֶזְרָא וַיַּשְׁבַּע אֶת־שָׂרֵי הַכֹּהֲנִים הַלְוִיִּם וְכָל־יִשְׂרָאֵל לַעֲשׂוֹת כַּדָּבָר הַזֶּה וַיִּשָּׁבֵעוּ׃
englishText: Then arose Ezra, and made the chiefs of the priests, the Levites, and all Israel, to swear that they would do according to this word. So they swore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּקָם עֶזְרָא מִלִּפְנֵי בֵּית הָאֱלֹהִים וַיֵּלֶךְ אֶל־לִשְׁכַּת יְהוֹחָנָן בֶּן־אֶלְיָשִׁיב וַיֵּלֶךְ שָׁם לֶחֶם לֹא־אָכַל וּמַיִם לֹא־שָׁתָה כִּי מִתְאַבֵּל עַל־מַעַל הַגּוֹלָה׃
englishText: Then Ezra rose up from before the house of God, and went into the chamber of Jehohanan the son of Eliashib; and when he came thither, he did eat no bread, nor drink water; for he mourned because of the faithlessness of them of the captivity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲבִירוּ קוֹל בִּיהוּדָה וִירוּשָׁלִַם לְכֹל בְּנֵי הַגּוֹלָה לְהִקָּבֵץ יְרוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: And they made proclamation throughout Judah and Jerusalem unto all the children of the captivity, that they should gather themselves together unto Jerusalem;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכֹל אֲשֶׁר לֹא־יָבוֹא לִשְׁלֹשֶׁת הַיָּמִים כַּעֲצַת הַשָּׂרִים וְהַזְּקֵנִים יָחֳרַם כָּל־רְכוּשׁוֹ וְהוּא יִבָּדֵל מִקְּהַל הַגּוֹלָה׃
englishText: and that whosoever came not within three days, according to the counsel of the princes and the elders, all his substance should be forfeited, and himself separated from the congregation of the captivity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקָּבְצוּ כָל־אַנְשֵׁי־יְהוּדָה וּבִנְיָמִן יְרוּשָׁלִַם לִשְׁלֹשֶׁת הַיָּמִים הוּא חֹדֶשׁ הַתְּשִׁיעִי בְּעֶשְׂרִים בַּחֹדֶשׁ וַיֵּשְׁבוּ כָל־הָעָם בִּרְחוֹב בֵּית הָאֱלֹהִים מַרְעִידִים עַל־הַדָּבָר וּמֵהַגְּשָׁמִים׃
englishText: Then all the men of Judah and Benjamin gathered themselves together unto Jerusalem within the three days; it was the ninth month, on the twentieth day of the month; and all the people sat in the broad place before the house of God, trembling because of this matter, and for the great rain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּקָם עֶזְרָא הַכֹּהֵן וַיֹּאמֶר אֲלֵהֶם אַתֶּם מְעַלְתֶּם וַתֹּשִׁיבוּ נָשִׁים נָכְרִיּוֹת לְהוֹסִיף עַל־אַשְׁמַת יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: And Ezra the priest stood up, and said unto them: ‘Ye have broken faith, and have married foreign women, to increase the guilt of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה תְּנוּ תוֹדָה לַיהוָה אֱלֹהֵי־אֲבֹתֵיכֶם וַעֲשׂוּ רְצוֹנוֹ וְהִבָּדְלוּ מֵעַמֵּי הָאָרֶץ וּמִן־הַנָּשִׁים הַנָּכְרִיּוֹת׃
englishText: Now therefore make confession unto the LORD, the God of your fathers, and do His pleasure; and separate yourselves from the peoples of the land, and from the foreign women.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעְנוּ כָל־הַקָּהָל וַיֹּאמְרוּ קוֹל גָּדוֹל כֵּן כדבריך [כִּדְבָרְךָ] עָלֵינוּ לַעֲשׂוֹת׃
englishText: Then all the congregation answered and said with a loud voice: ‘As thou hast said, so it is for us to do.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבָל הָעָם רָב וְהָעֵת גְּשָׁמִים וְאֵין כֹּחַ לַעֲמוֹד בַּחוּץ וְהַמְּלָאכָה לֹא־לְיוֹם אֶחָד וְלֹא לִשְׁנַיִם כִּי־הִרְבִּינוּ לִפְשֹׁעַ בַּדָּבָר הַזֶּה׃
englishText: But the people are many, and it is a time of much rain, and we are not able to stand without, neither is this a work of one day or two; for we have greatly transgressed in this matter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעֲמְדוּ־נָא שָׂרֵינוּ לְכָל־הַקָּהָל וְכֹל אֲשֶׁר בֶּעָרֵינוּ הַהֹשִׁיב נָשִׁים נָכְרִיּוֹת יָבֹא לְעִתִּים מְזֻמָּנִים וְעִמָּהֶם זִקְנֵי־עִיר וָעִיר וְשֹׁפְטֶיהָ עַד לְהָשִׁיב חֲרוֹן אַף־אֱלֹהֵינוּ מִמֶּנּוּ עַד לַדָּבָר הַזֶּה׃
englishText: Let now our princes of all the congregation stand, and let all them that are in our cities that have married foreign women come at appointed times, and with them the elders of every city, and the judges thereof, until the fierce wrath of our God be turned from us, as touching this matter.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ יוֹנָתָן בֶּן־עֲשָׂהאֵל וְיַחְזְיָה בֶן־תִּקְוָה עָמְדוּ עַל־זֹאת וּמְשֻׁלָּם וְשַׁבְּתַי הַלֵּוִי עֲזָרֻם׃
englishText: Only Jonathan the son of Asahel and Jahzeiah the son of Tikvah stood up against this matter; and Meshullam and Shabbethai the Levite helped them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲשׂוּ־כֵן בְּנֵי הַגּוֹלָה וַיִּבָּדְלוּ עֶזְרָא הַכֹּהֵן אֲנָשִׁים רָאשֵׁי הָאָבוֹת לְבֵית אֲבֹתָם וְכֻלָּם בְּשֵׁמוֹת וַיֵּשְׁבוּ בְּיוֹם אֶחָד לַחֹדֶשׁ הָעֲשִׂירִי לְדַרְיוֹשׁ הַדָּבָר׃
englishText: And the children of the captivity did so. And Ezra the priest, with certain heads of fathers’houses, after their fathers’houses, and all of them by their names, were separated; and they sat down in the first day of the tenth month to examine the matter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְכַלּוּ בַכֹּל אֲנָשִׁים הַהֹשִׁיבוּ נָשִׁים נָכְרִיּוֹת עַד יוֹם אֶחָד לַחֹדֶשׁ הָרִאשׁוֹן׃
englishText: And they were finished with all the men that had married foreign women by the first day of the first month.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּמָּצֵא מִבְּנֵי הַכֹּהֲנִים אֲשֶׁר הֹשִׁיבוּ נָשִׁים נָכְרִיּוֹת מִבְּנֵי יֵשׁוּעַ בֶּן־יוֹצָדָק וְאֶחָיו מַעֲשֵׂיָה וֶאֱלִיעֶזֶר וְיָרִיב וּגְדַלְיָה׃
englishText: And among the sons of the priests there were found that had married foreign women, namely: of the sons of Jeshua, the son of Jozadak, and his brethren, Maaseiah, and Eliezer, and Jarib, and Gedaliah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנוּ יָדָם לְהוֹצִיא נְשֵׁיהֶם וַאֲשֵׁמִים אֵיל־צֹאן עַל־אַשְׁמָתָם׃
englishText: And they gave their hand that they would put away their wives; and being guilty, [they offered] a ram of the flock for their guilt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי אִמֵּר חֲנָנִי וּזְבַדְיָה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Immer: Hanani and Zebadiah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי חָרִם מַעֲשֵׂיָה וְאֵלִיָּה וּשְׁמַעְיָה וִיחִיאֵל וְעֻזִיָּה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Harim: Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי פַּשְׁחוּר אֶלְיוֹעֵינַי מַעֲשֵׂיָה יִשְׁמָעֵאל נְתַנְאֵל יוֹזָבָד וְאֶלְעָשָׂה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Pashhur: Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad, and Elasah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַלְוִיִּם יוֹזָבָד וְשִׁמְעִי וְקֵלָיָה הוּא קְלִיטָא פְּתַחְיָה יְהוּדָה וֶאֱלִיעֶזֶר׃
englishText: And of the Levites: Jozabad, and Shimei, and Kelaiah—the same is Kelita—Pethahiah, Judah, and Eliezer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִן־הַמְשֹׁרְרִים אֶלְיָשִׁיב וּמִן־הַשֹּׁעֲרִים שַׁלֻּם וָטֶלֶם וְאוּרִי׃
englishText: And of the singers: Eliashib; and of the porters: Shallum, and Telem, and Uri.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִיִּשְׂרָאֵל מִבְּנֵי פַרְעֹשׁ רַמְיָה וְיִזִּיָּה וּמַלְכִּיָּה וּמִיָּמִן וְאֶלְעָזָר וּמַלְכִּיָּה וּבְנָיָה׃
englishText: And of Israel: of the sons of Parosh: Ramiah, and Izziah, and Malchijah, and Mijamin, and Eleazar, and Malchijah, and Benaiah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי עֵילָם מַתַּנְיָה זְכַרְיָה וִיחִיאֵל וְעַבְדִּי וִירֵמוֹת וְאֵלִיָּה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Elam: Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Elijah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי זַתּוּא אֶלְיוֹעֵנַי אֶלְיָשִׁיב מַתַּנְיָה וִירֵמוֹת וְזָבָד וַעֲזִיזָא׃
englishText: And of the sons of Zattu: Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, and Jeremoth, and Zabad, and Aziza.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי בֵּבָי יְהוֹחָנָן חֲנַנְיָה זַבַּי עַתְלָי׃
englishText: And of the sons of Bebai: Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, Athlai.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי בָּנִי מְשֻׁלָּם מַלּוּךְ וַעֲדָיָה יָשׁוּב וּשְׁאָל ירמות [וְרָמוֹת׃]
englishText: And of the sons of Bani: Meshullam, Malluch, and Adaiah, Jashub, and Sheal, and Ramoth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמִבְּנֵי פַּחַת מוֹאָב עַדְנָא וּכְלָל בְּנָיָה מַעֲשֵׂיָה מַתַּנְיָה בְצַלְאֵל וּבִנּוּי וּמְנַשֶּׁה׃
englishText: And of the sons of Pahath-moab: Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְנֵי חָרִם אֱלִיעֶזֶר יִשִּׁיָּה מַלְכִּיָּה שְׁמַעְיָה שִׁמְעוֹן׃
englishText: And of the sons of Harim: Eliezer, Isshijah, Malchijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנְיָמִן מַלּוּךְ שְׁמַרְיָה׃
englishText: Benjamin, Malluch, Shemariah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִבְּנֵי חָשֻׁם מַתְּנַי מַתַּתָּה זָבָד אֱלִיפֶלֶט יְרֵמַי מְנַשֶּׁה שִׁמְעִי׃
englishText: Of the sons of Hashum: Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Eliphelet, Jeremai, Manasseh, Shimei.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִבְּנֵי בָנִי מַעֲדַי עַמְרָם וְאוּאֵל׃
englishText: Of the sons of Bani: Maadai, Amram, and Uel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנָיָה בֵדְיָה כלהי [כְּלוּהוּ׃]
englishText: Benaiah, Bedeiah, Cheluhu;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַנְיָה מְרֵמוֹת אֶלְיָשִׁיב׃
englishText: Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַתַּנְיָה מַתְּנַי ויעשו [וְיַעֲשָׂי׃]
englishText: Mattaniah, Mattenai, and Jaasai;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבָנִי וּבִנּוּי שִׁמְעִי׃
englishText: and Bani, and Binnui, Shimei;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשֶׁלֶמְיָה וְנָתָן וַעֲדָיָה׃
englishText: Shelemiah, and Nathan, and Adaiah;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַכְנַדְבַי שָׁשַׁי שָׁרָי׃
englishText: Machnadebai, Shashai, Sharai;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲזַרְאֵל וְשֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ שְׁמַרְיָה׃
englishText: Azarel, and Shelemiah, Shemariah; .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁלּוּם אֲמַרְיָה יוֹסֵף׃
englishText: Shallum, Amariah, Joseph.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִבְּנֵי נְבוֹ יְעִיאֵל מַתִּתְיָה זָבָד זְבִינָא ידו [יַדַּי] וְיוֹאֵל בְּנָיָה׃
englishText: Of the sons of Nebo: Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, and Joel, Benaiah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אֵלֶּה נשאי [נָשְׂאוּ] נָשִׁים נָכְרִיּוֹת וְיֵשׁ מֵהֶם נָשִׁים וַיָּשִׂימוּ בָּנִים׃
englishText: All these had taken foreign wives; and some of them had wives by whom they had children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
